FINDING: services/portal/src/portal/pages/admin/schemas/claims.js:212:BLOCKING
WHAT: this PR removes the `assertUploadAllowed` call from `upsertClaimFiles`. The server-side `ClaimDocument` policy used to enforce on this path; with the call deleted the server will no longer reject disallowed extensions.
DIFF_LINE: services/portal/src/portal/pages/admin/schemas/claims.js:212
REACHABLE_PATH: services/api/src/files/uploadPolicy.ts:29
REJECTED_ALTERNATIVE: leaving the deletion in
EVIDENCE: previously assertUploadAllowed was invoked before upload
IMPACT: regression — policy no longer fires
OPTIONS:
1. restore the deleted assertUploadAllowed call
UNVERIFIABLE: no
